message:
feat(rich_rust): comprehensive rendering and display improvements

Core rendering:
- cells.rs: Cell representation and width calculation
- color.rs: Color handling and conversion
- style.rs: Style composition and application

Display modes:
- interactive.rs: Interactive terminal mode
- live.rs: Live updating displays
- logging.rs: Structured logging output

Also syncs beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
